name: Economy
description: Anything about the broader US or global economy: GDP, inflation, jobs numbers, recession talk, growth, or general economic conditions.

name: Trade & Tariffs
description: Tariffs, trade deals or disputes, import/export policy, trade wars, or specific countries/companies targeted by trade action.

name: Fed & Monetary Policy
description: The Federal Reserve, interest rates, the Fed Chair or other Fed personnel, monetary policy decisions, or commentary directed at the Fed.

name: Political Appointments
description: Nominations, firings, resignations, or commentary about cabinet members, agency heads, or other senior administration/government personnel.

name: Other
description: Anything that doesn't plausibly connect to the economy, trade, the Fed, or political appointments -- personal, social, or unrelated commentary.
